integrated_daily_flow: 4. Match demand to existing pages (Phase 17 classifier + Phase 18 matcher)
5. Score pages and opportunities (Phase 17 scorer + Phase 18 quality scorer)
8. Execute: upgrade existing pages FIRST (Phase 18 priority)
9. Execute: create new page ONLY if score 90+ and no existing match
11. Request GSC UI indexing for changed high-value pages if eligible
12. Measure next day (GSC API + Phase 17 keyword miner)
phase_18_provides: Upgrade vs consolidate vs noindex decisions
Upgrade modules (short answer, FAQ, examples, schema)
combined_output: Phase 17 finds demand signals → Phase 18 matches them to programmatic pages → combined scoring decides: upgrade existing page OR (rarely) create new page → Auditor approves → execute → deploy → measure
